title: cadia purpurea
intro: Cadia purpurea, also known as Purple Cadia, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to tropical regions of Australia and Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cadia purpurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and provide relief from pain and discomfort. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
